Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Continued To Nov-28-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tenative ruling. DEFENDANT BIANCA LARSON-SAARMAN'S DEMURRER TO all claims alleged in the first amended complaint is overruled as to all claims. The first amended complaint sufficiently alleges facts showing that the acts and/or omissions of Ms. Larson-Saarman, whether committed as an owner of unit 304 and/or as an agent of co-defendant HOA, warrant imposition of liability against her as to each of the five claims. There is no obligation, at least at the pleading stage, for a plaintiff to identify in which one or both of two possible capacities a defendant acted for which the plaintiff seeks to hold the defendant liable. In all events, it is fairly clear that the first two causes of action relate to Ms. Larson-Saarman's conduct as president of the HOA and the last three relate to her conduct as the owner of a unit adjacent to plaintiff's unit. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order in hard copy to Dept. 302 that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
